announcements.title: sf-pi v0.70.0 — sf-agentscript: provision_agent_user verb — idempotent agent-user setup
announcements.body: sf-agentscript: provision_agent_user verb — idempotent agent-user setup — sf-agentscript: inspect surfaces agent_type on config, not system

announcements.title: sf-pi requires pi 0.73 or newer
announcements.body: Current sf-pi builds require pi 0.73 or newer. Run `pi update` before upgrading sf-pi; PI_CODING_AGENT_SESSION_DIR remains supported for relocating session storage.
